sentences.arabic: تُحِبُّ الأُمُّ أَنْ تَطْبُخَ الطَّعَامَ فِي البَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Majka voli kuhati hranu kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: The mother loves to cook food at home.
She prepares rice, meat, and vegetables.

sentences.arabic: الأَكْلُ البَيْتِيُّ أَفْضَلُ مِنَ الأَكْلِ فِي المَطْعَمِ.
sentences.translation: Domaća hrana je bolja od hrane u restoranu.
sentences.translationEn: Home cooking is better than restaurant food.
The family sits together and eats.
